zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Mainwaring於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆時，她的父親William Warmingham DeMainwaring22歲，母親Agnes De Arderne5歲。她於1304年與William De Trussell在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1325年在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Mainwaring于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆时，她的父亲William Warmingham DeMainwaring22岁，母亲Agnes De Arderne5岁。她于1304年与William De Trussell在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1325年在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Mainwaring was born about 1280, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Warmingham DeMainwaring, was 22 and her mother, Agnes De Arderne, was 5. She married William De Trussell in 1304, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1325, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Mainwaring est née environ 1280, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Warmingham DeMainwaring, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Arderne, avait 5 ans. Elle a épousé William De Trussell en 1304, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1325, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Mainwaring um 1280 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Warmingham DeMainwaring 22 und ihre Mutter Agnes De Arderne 5. Sie hat 1304 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom William De Trussell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1325 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Mainwaring è nata il circa 1280 nel Warmingham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Warmingham DeMainwaring, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Agnes De Arderne, aveva 5 anni. Lei sposato William De Trussell nel 1304, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1325, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Mainwaringが約1280年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父William Warmingham DeMainwaringは22歳，母Agnes De Arderneは5歳であった。1304年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでWilliam De Trussellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1325年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Mainwaring(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Warmingham DeMainwaring(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De Arderne(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 William De Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Mainwaring nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Warmingham DeMainwaring, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Arderne, tinha 5 anos. Ela casou-se com William De Trussell em 1304, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Mainwaring родилась около 1280 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Warmingham DeMainwaring было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Arderne, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Trussell в 1304 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1325 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
